tools.name: read_query
tools.description: Run a SELECT query against the SQLite database stored under /data and return matching rows as JSON.

db_path.description: Path to the SQLite database file

tools.name: write_query
tools.description: Run an INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE statement against the SQLite database stored under /data.

query.description: INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE statement to run

db_path.description: Path to the SQLite database file

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List the names of all tables in the SQLite database.

db_path.description: Path to the SQLite database file

tools.name: get_table_schema
tools.description: Get the column names and types of one table in the SQLite database.

table_name.description: Name of the table to describe

db_path.description: Path to the SQLite database file
